title: RenRe Kit Extension Manifest
description: Schema for extension manifest.json — declares all metadata, capabilities, and requirements of a RenRe Kit extension.

name.description: Unique extension identifier (kebab-case). Must not start with '__'.

displayName.description: Human-readable extension name shown in Console UI.

description.description: Short description of what the extension does.

minSdkVersion.description: Minimum @renre-kit/extension-sdk version required (semver). Required for marketplace extensions.

entrypoint.description: Relative path to the compiled backend entry point JS file (e.g. 'backend/index.js').

actions.description: List of actions exposed by this extension's backend.

bundle.description: Relative path to the compiled UI bundle (e.g. 'ui/index.js').

pages.description: Pages provided by this extension UI.

styles.description: Optional relative path to a CSS file to inject alongside the UI bundle.

mcp.description: MCP bridge configuration (stdio or SSE transport). One transport type per extension.

migrations.description: Relative path to the migrations directory containing NNN_name.up.sql / NNN_name.down.sql pairs.

settings.description: Extension settings schema — defines configurable values shown in Console UI.

skills.description: Skills provided by this extension (placed in .github/skills/{name}/SKILL.md).

scripts.description: Executable scripts provided by this extension (copied to .renre-kit/scripts/{extension-name}/).

chatTools.description: Chat tools that this extension provides for use in Copilot SDK chat sessions.

chatAgents.description: Custom chat agents that this extension provides. Each agent specifies a system prompt and references chatTools by name.

description.description: Human-readable description of what the action does.

path.description: Route path relative to the extension mount point (e.g. '/items' or '/items/:id').

id.description: Page identifier — must match the key in the ExtensionModule.pages map.

label.description: Display label shown in the Console sidebar navigation.

icon.description: Optional icon name (from the Console icon set).

path.description: URL path segment for this page within the extension routes.

command.description: Command to spawn. Restricted to allowlist: node, npx, python, python3, deno, bun, uvx, docker.

args.description: Arguments passed to the command. Shell metacharacters are rejected.

env.description: Additional environment variables for the spawned process.

headers.description: HTTP headers to include with the SSE connection request.

reconnect.description: Whether to automatically reconnect on disconnect.

key.description: Setting key used in config object passed to ExtensionContext.

type.description: Setting type. 'vault' values are stored encrypted and never logged.

label.description: Human-readable label shown in the settings form.

description.description: Help text shown below the input in the settings form.

required.description: Whether this setting must be provided before the extension can be mounted.

default.description: Default value used when the setting is not explicitly configured.

label.description: Display label shown to the user.

value.description: Actual value stored when this option is selected.

ExtensionPermissions.description: Permissions requested by the extension. Displayed to the user at install time.

database.description: Whether the extension requires SQLite database access via ScopedDatabase proxy.

network.description: Allowed network hostnames (e.g. ['api.example.com']). Requests to other hosts are blocked.

mcp.description: Whether the extension requires MCP bridge access.

hooks.description: Hook events the extension subscribes to.

vault.description: Vault key names the extension is permitted to read.

filesystem.description: Filesystem paths the extension is permitted to access (glob patterns).

llm.description: Whether the extension requires LLM access via ScopedLLM proxy.

entrypoint.description: Relative path to the hook handler entry point.

timeout.description: Maximum milliseconds for a hook handler to respond before being timed out.

name.description: Skill identifier (used as the directory name under .github/skills/).

description.description: Short description of what the skill does.

file.description: Relative path to the SKILL.md file within the extension package.

description.description: Short description of what this script does.

file.description: Relative path to the script file within the extension package.

entrypoint.description: Relative path to the context provider entry point.

maxTokens.description: Maximum token budget this provider may consume.

name.description: Tool identifier (alphanumeric + hyphens). Namespaced as {extensionName}__{name} in chat sessions.

description.description: Human-readable description of what the tool does.

parameters.description: JSON Schema describing the tool's input parameters.

endpoint.description: HTTP method and path routing to the extension backend (e.g. 'POST /search').

displayName.description: Human-readable name shown in the chat agent selector.

description.description: Short description of what this agent specializes in.

prompt.description: System prompt override when this agent is selected.

tools.description: References to chatTools by name that this agent can use.
